turns.q: Which of your products is best for that, and why is it a good fit?
turns.replyTail:
ed, sculpted fit

Why these are a good fit for your concern:

high-quality denim with a balance of structure and stretch tends to hold its shape better
a comfortable waistband and a smooth fit through the hips and thighs usually make the biggest difference
high-rise and straight or bootcut cuts are often the safest picks if you want something versatile and dependable
If you want the single best pick based on quality plus versatility, Diana Relaxed Straight is the safest recommendation.
